holding_menu.title: The Holding
holding_menu.overview_desc: Learn about our mission and vision.

footer.about: We are a technology holding company dedicated to building the infrastructure of the future.
footer.newsletter_desc: Get the latest updates from Arasue Horizon.

hero.title: Perspective changes everything.
hero.subtitle: The world moves fast, but we look further. Arasue Horizon is the strategic matrix connecting global markets, capital, and industries with a clear, long-range vision. We don't just manage the present; we blueprint tomorrow.

vision.title: Driving Innovation Across Industries
vision.p1: At Arasue Horizon, we believe in the power of diversified excellence. By incubating and scaling specialized subsidiaries, we create a robust ecosystem where technology, media, and consumer goods converge.
vision.p2: Our central holding provides strategic direction, capital allocation, and shared resources, allowing our divisions to focus purely on disrupting their respective markets.

forge.name: Arasue Forge
forge.description: Great ideas mean nothing if they stay in the air. Arasue Forge is the development studio where advanced software and critical tech come to life with precision, power, and flawless performance. We build the digital infrastructure that defines industries.

labs.name: Arasue Labs
labs.description: True excellence accepts no shortcuts. Arasue Labs bridges scientific rigor with nature's purity, managing the import and logistics of premium products with absolute traceability. Unwavering quality, from the source to your hands.

media.name: Arasue Media
media.description: In a sea of constant noise, we create depth. Arasue Media produces, publishes, and distributes high-fidelity content that captures attention and leaves a real mark. Powerful storytelling backed by sophisticated execution.

protection.name: Arasue Protection
protection.description: Real success is never left to chance. Arasue Protection shields your life, health, and wealth with high-tier insurance solutions and absolute certainty. We protect your legacy so you can focus on building it.

global.title: Global Presence
global.desc: Operating seamlessly across North America and the world.

leadership.elena_desc: Former staff engineer at major tech firms. Leads product engineering and platform scale.
leadership.marcus_desc: Cultural strategist who has manufactured multiple global viral moments.

work.title: Featured Work
work.subtitle: We build scalable architectures and beautiful interfaces that drive real business metrics.
work.project1_desc: A complete overhaul of a legacy financial dashboard, migrating to Next.js and Tailwind to improve load times by 400% and user retention by 35%.
work.project2_desc: Native-feeling headless commerce application using React Native and Shopify Storefront API. Increased mobile conversion rates by over 120%.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: We don't just write code; we engineer solutions designed to scale from day one.
process.step1_desc: We analyze your business needs and craft a tailored technical plan.
process.arch_desc: We design scalable system architectures and beautiful UI/UX that align with your business goals.
process.step2_desc: Agile building, rigorous testing, and a flawless launch.
process.step3_desc: We ensure your product scales efficiently.

pricing.title: Transparent SaaS Pricing
pricing.features: Includes hosting, updates, and priority support.

testimonials.text1: Arasue Forge transformed our entire digital infrastructure. Their architecture allowed us to scale from 10k to 500k monthly active users without a single hiccup.
testimonials.text2: The sheer speed and quality of their React development is unmatched. They don't just build apps, they build products that people love to use.

cta.title: Ready to build?
cta.subtitle: Stop compromising on your engineering quality. Partner with us and scale your digital products today.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do you offer custom development outside these plans?
faq.a1: Yes, we handle enterprise-grade custom applications. Contact us for a custom quote.
faq.a2: We specialize in the React ecosystem (Next.js), Node.js, and cloud-native architectures.
faq.q3: How does the SaaS web model work?
faq.a3: Instead of a massive upfront cost, you pay a small setup fee and a monthly subscription that covers hosting, maintenance, and minor updates forever.

josue_profile.title: Josue Daniel Lopez Barreras
josue_profile.role: CEO & Co-Founder, Arasue Horizon | Technical Product Manager
josue_profile.summary: Results-driven Technical Product Manager with 8+ years of experience delivering enterprise SaaS products at the intersection of InsurTech, HealthTech, and AI automation. With a strong focus on operational excellence and complex system architecture, he has engineered high-caliber multi-carrier API integrations and "Zero-Touch" LLM engines to scale businesses globally without compromising regulatory compliance or security.

exp_alex.role: Head of Product & Technical Program Manager
exp_alex.desc: Owned end-to-end product lifecycle for an AI-powered enterprise insurance platform. Consolidated 4 legacy systems, reducing TCO by 75%, and engineered a Zero-Touch LLM automation engine that cut processing times from 40 to under 5 minutes.

exp_tesla.desc: Architected a Multi-Carrier API Gateway integrating Liberty Mutual, SURA, and HDI. Led product expansion across 5+ Latin American markets, automating 85% of insurance operational tasks.

exp_primex.desc: Managed a $5M+ portfolio of IoT-based predictive maintenance systems for critical healthcare equipment across 15,000+ sites, achieving 99.9% uptime and coordinating global hardware/software engineers.

josue_profile.edu_honors: Valedictorian (GPA 3.96/4.0) — Best Graduate, Class of 2018 | State Award for Academic Merit in Engineering
